title: RIMS Ranchi Notification 2026 - Apply Offline Various Principal Posts
description: Rajendra Institute of Medical Sciences (RIMS), Ranchi, has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Principal Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the MDS can grab this chance and apply for the RIMS Ranchi Notification 2026 . Here, we provided more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 ...
